meta.spec: CRIE_Enterprise_Specification_v1.1.1.md Module 06 (§98-§115), Module 49 (§547-§552); decisions R-02, R-03, R-04, R-08, R-10, R-11

nodes.name: Start (Compliance Results in)
nodes.notes: Input: array of canonical Compliance Results (§295) from WF-003, plus context (proposalId, executionId, metadata). §100.

nodes.name: Validate §295 Contract
nodes.notes: §298 fail-fast on invalid input contract. No reasoning performed (§98).

nodes.name: Compliance Matrix (§102/§547)
nodes.notes: Builds one row per requirement using configurable column mapping (output.config.yaml, §364). S7-1.

nodes.name: Executive Summary (PR-007, §109/§548)
nodes.notes: Counts computed deterministically (R-10/R-11); narrative from PR-007 (R-04). S7-2.

nodes.name: Evidence Report (§110)
nodes.notes: Every evidence item used, one row each. S7-3.

nodes.name: Gap Analysis (§549, PR-006/PR-007)
nodes.notes: Collected from PR-006 output attached to each result; no new prompt ID (R-04). S7-4.

nodes.name: Risk Register (§550, PR-006/PR-007)
nodes.notes: Collected from PR-006 output; no new prompt ID (R-04). S7-5.

nodes.name: Review States + Reviewer Workflow (§106/§107/§551)
nodes.notes: Applies §105 row review rules and review state machine. Rejected -> WF-003. S7-8.

nodes.name: SW-025 Google Sheets Writer (§265/§364)
nodes.notes: Configuration-driven column mapping; no hardcoded columns. Adapter provisioned in deployment. S7-7.

nodes.name: Assemble Proposal Package (§552) + Audit (§112)
nodes.notes: S7-6 (PR-006 proposal writing wired upstream), S7-9 (export rules + audit trail). Deterministic (§113).
